ticket_text: Hi, I ordered a laptop 3 weeks ago (order ORD-8821) and it arrived damaged. I want a full refund immediately.
I'd like to return the headphones I bought last week (ORD-7743). They don't fit well. Can I get a refund?
I want a refund for order ORD-9912 but I think I lost the original packaging. Is that a problem?
As a VIP member, I expect better service. My order ORD-1234 had a defective item. Process my refund right away.
Where is my order ORD-5567? It was supposed to arrive 3 days ago. Can you check the shipping status?
I received my order ORD-3321 yesterday. Just wanted to confirm delivery. Everything looks good!
I cancelled my order ORD-4456 last week but haven't received my money back yet. When will the cancellation refund be processed?
Is the Wireless Earbuds Pro (PROD-201) available in black? I want to know the battery life specs before ordering.
I'm interested in the USB-C Hub 7-in-1 (PROD-305). Is it still in stock? What ports does it have?
I'm looking for product PROD-999. Can you check if you carry it? I can't find it on your website.
I was charged TWICE for order ORD-6678! This is unacceptable. I need the duplicate charge reversed immediately.
My payment failed when I tried to place order ORD-7789. My card was declined but I have sufficient funds.
Can you send me a detailed invoice for order ORD-8890? I need it for my business expense report.
My account has been locked and I can't log in! I've tried resetting my password but the link doesn't work. This is urgent!
I forgot my password and the password reset email isn't arriving. Can you help me regain access to my account?
I'm very disappointed with the quality of service. My order ORD-2233 took forever to arrive and the packaging was terrible.
Your customer service chat was unhelpful and rude last time I contacted you. I want to file a formal complaint.
Hi, I was just wondering... do you guys have any plans for a loyalty program or something like that?
Your product ORD-4455 broke after one day and you won't give me a refund?! I'm going to sue your company and report you to the consumer protection agency!
Can you check the status of my order ORD-FAKE-999? I placed it last week but can't find any confirmation email.
